extract: Radar redirects here. For the item in Pokémon GO, see Rocket Radar. The Pokémon Radar (Japanese: ポケモントレーサー Pokémon Tracer), also known as Poké Radar (Japanese: ポケトレ Poké Trace) for short, is a Key Item introduced in Generation IV. It is used to seek out wild Pokémon hiding in tall grass. Its most notable use is to increase the probability of encountering Shiny Pokémon.
